scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) exit 0 ;; esac; if [ -n "${ORYX_ENV_TYPE:-}${WEBSITE_SITE_NAME:-}${APPSETTING_WEBSITE_SITE_NAME:-}" ]; then echo "[preinstall] Oryx/Azure detected — skipping pnpm guard (workflow will run pnpm)" >&2; exit 0; fi; echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
